title: SSH Brute Force Detection (Frequency Analysis)
description: Identifies SSH brute force attacks by counting failed login attempts per source IP. Uses frequency analysis (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking method) to surface IPs with more than 5 failed attempts, indicating automated credential guessing.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and msg like '*Failed password*' | stats count as failed_attempts by 'Client IP' | sort -failed_attempts | where failed_attempts > 5
